title: Update examples use lines to new namespaces
acceptance_criteria: All PHP files in examples/ directory have their use statements updated
All 'use SugarCraft\Dash\Grid\' references changed to appropriate new namespaces
All 'new Grid\ClassName()' instantiations changed to new namespace
Examples run without fatal errors due to namespace issues
Example output matches expected behavior (no semantic changes)
deliverables: Updated examples/*.php files with correct use statements

notes.only_use_lines: Per the plan: 'Examples in examples/ get their use lines updated only — no semantic changes'. Do not rewrite logic.
notes.boxer_to_pad: Any example using Boxer::new() needs to be updated to Pad::new()
